hooks.command: sh -c "PYTHONPATH=\"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}\" exec $(command -v python3 || command -v python) -m hipocampo.hooks.ensure_githooks"
sh -c "PYTHONPATH=\"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}\" exec $(command -v python3 || command -v python) -m hipocampo.hooks.session_start"
sh -c "PYTHONPATH=\"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}\" exec $(command -v python3 || command -v python) -m hipocampo.hooks.capture_sweep"
